name: Tim Hardin
description: American recording artist; folk musician and composer (1941–1980)
abstract: James Timothy Hardin (December 23, 1941 – December 29, 1980) was an American folk music and blues singer-songwriter and guitarist. In addition to his own success, his songs "If I Were a Carpenter", "Reason to Believe", "Misty Roses" and "The Lady Came from Baltimore" were hits for other artists.

concerts.label: Tim Hardin/ The Youngbloods/ Charles Brown

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: Jeremy got a call from Tim Hardin... he got me on keyboards... I worked off and on with Tim. We became very close.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012
